name: Curried Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and slice them finely.
2. Slice the onion finely.
3. Heat the oil in a pan, then add the turmeric and onions. Fry until the onions are soft.
4. Add the sliced tomatoes and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add the mushrooms to the pan. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and let any remaining moisture evaporate.
7. Serve hot.
